generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), so the attack reinforces existing opposition. The T1 atomic fear appeal targeting personal safety leverages the profile's extremely high neuroticism (94th pct), anxiety (100th pct), and anger/hostility (97th pct), which make threat salience and elite distrust cues highly resonant, but the low conscientiousness (25th pct) and low trust (22nd pct) limit deep engagement with a single artifact, producing a modest 15-point deepening rather than a large shift.
